pkgmetadata.longdescription: ipyvolumeDocumentation Version DownloadsIPython widget for rendering 3d volumes and glyphs (e.g. scatter and quiver) in the Jupyter notebook.. figure httpsraw.githubusercontent.commaartenbreddelsipyvolumemastermiscscreencast.gif alt screencast screencastInstallation------------To install use pip pip install ipyvolume jupyter nbextension enable --py --sys-prefix ipyvolumeTo install use pip (as non-admin) pip install ipyvolume --user jupyter nbextension enable --py --user ipyvolumeFor a development installation (requires npm), git clone httpsgithub.commaartenbreddelsipyvolume.git cd ipyvolume pip install -e . jupyter nbextension install --py --symlink --sys-prefix ipyvolume jupyter nbextension enable --py --sys-prefix ipyvolume.. Documentation image httpsreadthedocs.orgprojectsipyvolumebadgeversionlatest target httpsipyvolume.readthedocs.ioenlatestbadgelatest.. Version image httpsimg.shields.iopypivipyvolume.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypiipyvolume.. Downloads image httpsimg.shields.iopypidmipyvolume.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypiipyvolume
